headline: Is Axon Enterprise, Inc. (AXON) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is AXON a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Axon Enterprise, Inc. on Rebound Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on AXON. Axon Enterprise, Inc.’s share was trading at $404.92 as of April 21st. AXON’s trailing and forward P/E were 267.38 and 54.05 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
